alt.zh_hans: 雨夜高层公寓工作室，信号分析仪与两把空椅子面对落雨的玻璃城市。
alt.en: A rain-night apartment studio where a signal analyzer and two empty chairs face the glass city.

alt.zh_hans: 深蓝档案室里排列着玻璃数据柜，一只抽屉发出洋红色微光。
alt.en: A deep-blue archive room of glass data drawers, one of them glowing magenta.

alt.zh_hans: 雨后黎明照亮玻璃都市，远方留下一条逐渐淡去的洋红信号。
alt.en: Dawn after rain lights the glass metropolis as a magenta signal fades into the horizon.

alt.zh_hans: 高空玻璃连廊横跨雨夜城市，一道洋红信号沿窗面穿过。
alt.en: An elevated glass corridor above the rainy city, crossed by a thin magenta signal.

alt.zh_hans: 空旷的雨夜地铁站，站台玻璃上浮现洋红色异常波形。
alt.en: An empty rain-night metro platform with an anomalous magenta waveform across the glass doors.

alt.zh_hans: 暴雨中的玻璃都市街道，青色灯光与一处洋红信号倒影落在湿地面上。
alt.en: A glass-city street in heavy rain, with cyan light and one magenta signal reflection on wet pavement.

alt.zh_hans: 暴雨天台布满天线阵列，洋红脉冲在城市上空连接设备。
alt.en: A storm-lashed rooftop antenna field carrying a magenta pulse above the city.

alt.zh_hans: 地下中继室的环形核心隔着安全玻璃发光，线缆倒映在积水中。
alt.en: An underground relay core glowing behind safety glass, with cables reflected in shallow water.

alt.zh_hans: 林瑶打开档案抽屉，周衡操作控制台，删除的共同记忆以光路显现。
alt.en: Lin Yao opens an archive drawer while Zhou Heng reveals erased shared memories at the console.

alt.zh_hans: 信号终局：二人在黎明连廊建立受控通道，一次洋红脉冲通过验证。
alt.en: Signal ending: at dawn the pair establish a controlled channel and one magenta pulse passes verification.

alt.zh_hans: 静默终局：中继核心熄灭，林瑶与周衡隔着玻璃成为陌生人。
alt.en: Silence ending: the relay dies and Lin Yao and Zhou Heng face each other as strangers through glass.

alt.zh_hans: 真相终局：二人在雨中天台开启公共发射，城市灯光逐点回应。
alt.en: Truth ending: the pair open the public transmitter in the rain as city lights answer.

alt.zh_hans: 林瑶与周衡隔着公寓站立，窗外洋红异常信号横贯雨夜城市。
alt.en: Lin Yao and Zhou Heng stand apart in the apartment as a magenta signal crosses the rainy city.

alt.zh_hans: 林瑶与周衡在空地铁站重逢，二人手中的分析仪映出同一段异常波形。
alt.en: Lin Yao and Zhou Heng reunite on an empty platform while their instruments catch the same anomaly.

alt.zh_hans: 林瑶与周衡站在雨夜玻璃都市前，洋红信号横贯二人身后的主视觉。
alt.en: Key art of Lin Yao and Zhou Heng before a rainy glass metropolis crossed by a magenta signal.

alt.zh_hans: 雨水覆盖的公寓窗外是一座深蓝城市，桌上信号仪旁留出标题空间。
alt.en: A deep-blue city through rain-covered apartment glass, with a signal analyzer and open title space.

alt.zh_hans: 回看界面视觉稿，交错对白条目与语音回放波形排列在玻璃面板内。
alt.en: Backlog mockup with alternating dialogue rows and a voice-replay waveform inside a glass panel.

alt.zh_hans: 选择界面视觉稿，三张玻璃选项卡中间一项以青色边框选中。
alt.en: Choice-screen mockup with three glass options and the middle option highlighted in cyan.

alt.zh_hans: 设置界面视觉稿，包含分类栏、滑杆、开关与音频分组。
alt.en: Configuration mockup with category rail, sliders, toggles, and audio groups.

alt.zh_hans: 画廊界面视觉稿，缩略图网格旁显示放大预览与筛选图标。
alt.en: Gallery mockup with a thumbnail grid, enlarged preview, and filter icons.

alt.zh_hans: 读档界面视觉稿，选中卡片以青色框和校验图形突出。
alt.en: Load-screen mockup with the selected card emphasized by a cyan frame and verification motif.

alt.zh_hans: 对白界面视觉稿，下方烟色玻璃消息框保留角色名与控制图标位置。
alt.en: Dialogue-screen mockup with a smoked-glass message panel and reserved speaker and control areas.

alt.zh_hans: 路线图视觉稿，共通节点分成三条路径并连接三个独立终局。
alt.en: Route-chart mockup where the common path splits into three routes and three distinct endings.

alt.zh_hans: 存档界面视觉稿，六张缩略图卡片以路线色标区分。
alt.en: Save-screen mockup with six thumbnail cards distinguished by route-color markers.

alt.zh_hans: 无字标题界面视觉稿，雨夜城市上叠加信号徽记与菜单框。
alt.en: Textless title-screen mockup with a signal emblem and menu frames over the rainy city.

alt.zh_hans: 雨幕信号循环视频的可重建分层源：base。
alt.en: Rebuildable source layer for the rain-signal loop: base.

alt.zh_hans: 雨幕信号循环视频的可重建分层源：rain-layer。
alt.en: Rebuildable source layer for the rain-signal loop: rain-layer.

alt.zh_hans: 雨幕信号循环视频的可重建分层源：signal-layer。
alt.en: Rebuildable source layer for the rain-signal loop: signal-layer.
